mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_warehouse ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, address_line1, address_line2, city, state, pincode, country, latitude, longitude, timezone, contact_phone, contact_email, manager_id, max_capacity_units, current_utilization_pct, is_active, is_returns_center, operating_hours_json, supported_carriers_json, total_skus, total_units, low_stock_count, pending_fulfillments, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT w.id, w.tenant, NOW(), w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_type, w.address_line1, w.address_line2, w.city, w.state, w.pincode, w.country, w.latitude, w.longitude, w.timezone, w.contact_phone, w.contact_email, w.manager_id, w.max_capacity_units, w.current_utilization_pct, w.is_active, w.is_returns_center, w.operating_hours_json, w.supported_carriers_json, COALESCE(inv_stats.total_skus, 0), COALESCE(inv_stats.total_units, 0), COALESCE(inv_stats.low_stock_count, 0), COALESCE(ful_stats.pending_fulfillments, 0), w.created_time, w.last_modified_time FROM hm_warehouse.warehouses w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT primary_fc, COUNT(*) as total_skus, SUM(available_quantity) as total_units, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE available_quantity <= low_stock_threshold) as low_stock_count FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item WHERE state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE') GROUP BY primary_fc ) inv_stats ON inv_stats.primary_fc = w.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT warehouse_id, COUNT(*) as pending_fulfillments FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders WHERE state_id IN ('INITIATED', 'PICKING', 'PACKING') GROUP BY warehouse_id ) ful_stats ON ful_stats.warehouse_id = w.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.warehouse_locations_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, location_code, zone, aisle, shelf, bin, location_type, capacity_units, current_units, is_active ) SELECT wl.id, w.tenant, NOW(), wl.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, wl.location_code, wl.zone, wl.aisle, wl.shelf, wl.bin, wl.location_type, COALESCE(wl.capacity_units, 0), COALESCE(wl.current_units, 0), wl.is_active FROM hm_warehouse.warehouse_locations wl JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON wl.warehouse_id = w.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.warehouse_inventory_flat ( warehouse_inventory_id, tenant, last_synced_at, warehouse_id, location_id, location_code, zone, aisle, shelf, bin, location_type, product_id, variant_id, sku, quantity_on_hand, quantity_reserved, quantity_available, quantity_damaged, last_counted_at, product_name, brand ) SELECT wi.id, w.tenant, NOW(), wl.warehouse_id, wi.location_id, wl.location_code, wl.zone, wl.aisle, wl.shelf, wl.bin, wl.location_type, wi.product_id, wi.variant_id, wi.sku, COALESCE(wi.quantity_on_hand, 0), COALESCE(wi.quantity_reserved, 0), COALESCE(wi.quantity_available, 0), COALESCE(wi.quantity_damaged, 0), wi.last_counted_at, COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE(p.brand, '') FROM hm_warehouse.warehouse_inventory wi JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouse_locations wl ON wi.location_id = wl.id JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON wl.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON wi.product_id = p.id
